summary: School Intelligence Panel unification feature fully tested on CapyMatch Athlete Journey page. All 15 features verified working correctly. The unified panel renders in main column with all sections: Header (score/fit/confidence/summary), Score Breakdown (5 sub_scores), Strengths, Risks/Gaps, Opportunity & Timing, Coach Signals, Recommended Strategy, and Actions. Right panel shows School Fit preview that scrolls to SI panel. Coach Watch card preserved. AI Assist 'Explore School Intelligence' scrolls to SI panel. Existing timeline, key contacts, and communication sections all working.
critical_code_review_comments: SchoolIntelligencePanel.js: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes on all sections
JourneyPage.js: Correctly imports and renders SchoolIntelligencePanel for non-basic users
School Fit preview in right panel correctly scrolls to #school-intelligence anchor
AI Assist button 'Explore School Intelligence' scrolls to SI panel instead of API call
CoachWatchCard.js: Still renders correctly with engagement signal interpretation
seed_data_creation: Used existing UCLA and Stanford program data
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Intelligence Panel fully tested. Key data-testid selectors: school-intelligence-panel (main panel), si-header, si-breakdown, si-strengths, si-risks, si-opportunity-timing, si-coach-signals, si-recommended-strategy, si-actions, school-fit-preview (right panel), coach-watch-card. UCLA programId: 85095202-8b95-4cb2-9390-3275d7840a3d, Stanford: e02f08c6-7c47-430a-aa8d-787a6fbeae00.
